person.name: Margaret Welles

burialPlace.address: Saint Mary's Churchyard, Swineshead, Lincolnshire, England

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Margaret Radcliffe formerly Welles aka Dymoke 

 Biography

Margaret was the daughter of Lionel Welles and his first wife Joan/Jane Waterton. (Maddison's Lincolnshire Pedigrees wrongly states that the first name of her mother was Beatrix. Her birth date is not known (though she was a younger child and her parents married in 1417), nor is her birthplace (her parents had lands and interests in several counties).

Margaret married Thomas Dymoke, son of Philip Dymoke of Lincolnshire and Joan Conyers. Their marriage place is not known. According to Maddison's Lincolnshire Pedigrees they married in 35 Henry VI (1456-7). They had the following children:

    Robert
    Lionel
    Anne
    another Anne
    Jane, who married John Fulnetby

Thomas Dymoke was executed in 1470. Before 8 May 1472 (when she is mentioned as Robert Radcliffe's wife in the Patent Rolls) Margaret remarried, her second husband being Robert Radcliffe.

Margaret died on 13 july 1480.

sourceList.title: Margret Welles Dymoke, "Find A Grave Index"

zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Welles於1434年出生在英國林可爾史爾維爾時，她的父親Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby28歲，母親Joan de Waterton34歲。她於1457年6月13日與Sir Thomas Dymoke在英國林可爾史爾格利姆斯比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1480年7月13日在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福享年46歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾斯文黑阿德聖 馬也斯 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Welles于1434年出生在英国林可爾史爾維爾时，她的父亲Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby28岁，母亲Joan de Waterton34岁。她于1457年6月13日与Sir Thomas Dymoke在英国林可爾史爾格利姆斯比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1480年7月13日在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福享年46岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾斯文黑阿德聖 馬也斯 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Welles was born in 1434, in Well, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby, was 28 and her mother, Joan de Waterton, was 34. She married Sir Thomas Dymoke on 13 June 1457, in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 13 July 1480, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Saint Mary's Churchyard, Swineshead, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Welles est née en 1434, à Well, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan de Waterton, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Dymoke le 13 juin 1457, à Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 juillet 1480, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Mary's Churchyard, Swineshead, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat am 13. Juni 1457 in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England Sir Thomas Dymoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Juli 1480 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Saint Mary's Churchyard, Swineshead, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Welles è nata il nel 1434 nel Well, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Joan de Waterton, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Dymoke il 13 giugno 1457, nel Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Wellesが1434年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウエルで生まれた時，父Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsbyは28歳，母Joan de Watertonは34歳であった。1457年6月13日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグリムスビーでSir Thomas Dymokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1480年7月13日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで46歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアスウィンエシェアドサイント マリ'ス チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Welles(이)가 1434년 영국 링코실르 웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Waterton(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1457년 6월 13일 영국 링코실르 그림스비에서 Sir Thomas Dymoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 7월 13일 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 스윈셰아드 세인트 마이'스 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Welles nasceu em 1434, em Well, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Waterton, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Dymoke em 13 de junho de 1457, em Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de julho de 1480, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint Mary's Churchyard, Swineshead, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Welles родилась в 1434 г. в местности велл, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Lionel "Leo" De Welles, Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Waterton, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Dymoke 13 июня 1457 г. в местности гримсби, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 июля 1480 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт мэри'с чурчярд, сваинешид, линколншир, Англия.
